stories.headline: Bermuda welcomes King Charles with boats, dancing and cake-cutting
stories.description: Schoolchildren turn out to meet the monarch, with exotic birds and Bob Marley music all part of the welcome.

stories.headline: Spirit Airlines begins ‘wind-down’, cancels all flights over fuel crisis
stories.description: The collapse of the US-based budget carrier due to a doubling in jet fuel prices will cost thousands of jobs.

stories.headline: UK’s Starmer eyes banning some pro-Palestine protests
stories.description: PM Keir Starmer says the phrase ‘globalise the Intifada’ should be ‘completely off limits’.

stories.headline: Who Is Nayib Bukele? El Salvador’s ‘coolest dictator’
stories.description: At 44, Bukele has built the world’s highest imprisonment rate and scrapped presidential term limits. What comes next?

stories.headline: Nepal celebrates return of stolen 13th-century Buddha statue from New York
stories.description: The Himalayan nation restores centuries-old statue, stolen in the 1980s, to its original temple in capital Kathmandu.
